description:
🕒 16:00–20:30

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/morimana-kaeru/

Get hooked on the charm of frogs! During the perfect season for creature watching, observe fascinating frogs that lay eggs in trees. The water's edge draws many living things, and you can enjoy rich nature all around. As it gets dark, you might discover something you've never seen before!

【Fee】
Adults 6,000 yen, Students 5,000 yen (includes guide, insurance, and materials)

【Capacity】20 people

【Guide】Mori no Field Gakusha (Forest Field School) staff

【What to bring】Light snacks, drinking water, observation tools (collection cases, nets), rain gear, flashlight, boots (you may walk through muddy areas)

【More information】
Mori no Field Gakusha website: https://morinomanabiya168.wixsite.com/website
location: 集合 飯能市立博物館前（国際興業バス「OH!!!・天覧山下」または「市民会館・博物館前」下車徒歩3分）
summary: Summer frog watching in the forest! Learn about day and night at Aojishi Valley
